channel.title: Be Not Deceived
channel.description: Dedicated to helping believers 'be not deceived' according to Jesus' command in Matthew 24:4.

item.title: Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - What Sign Will Signal the End of the World
item.dc:creator: Admin - Be Not Deceived
item.description:
What Is Jesus’ End-Time Timeline

This is part 1 of Jesus’ End-Time Timeline series as documented in Matthew 24. This article covers Jesus’ response to the disciples’ third question in Matthew 24:3 - “What Sign Will Signal The End Of The World?”

At the end of part 3 of this series, is a pdf of my side-by-side comparison of Jesus’ End-Time Timeline as recorded in Matthew 24, Mark 13, and Luke 21.  If you would like the actual spreadsheet, send me an e-mail.  Let me know if you need it in .xlsx or .ods format.

NOTE - I am intentionally keeping my comments, opinions, interpretations, etc., to a bare minimum.  The whole point is to determine what the Word of God actually says, not what I, or anyone else, think it says.

What Exactly Does Jesus Say

Discussion Prompted By Disciples

Mat 24:1 NLT - As Jesus was leaving the Temple grounds, his disciples pointed out to him the various Temple buildings.

Mat 24:2 NLT - But he responded, “Do you see all these buildings? I tell you the truth, they will be completely demolished. Not one stone will be left on top of another!”

The Disciples’ Three Questions

  • When Will All This Happen - Part 3
  • What Sign Will Signal Your Return - Part 2
  • What Sign Will Signal The End of the World - Part 1

NOTE - Jesus answers these questions in the reverse order they are listed in Matthew 24:3.

Mat 24:3 NLT - Later, Jesus sat on the Mount of Olives. His disciples came to him privately and said, “Tell us, when will all this happen? What sign will signal your return and the end of the world?“

What Sign Will Signal The End Of The World?

  • False Christs
  • Many Deceived
  • Wars And Threats of Wars

The End Is Not Yet

Mat 24:4 NLT - Jesus told them, “Don’t let anyone mislead you,

Mat 24:5 NLT - for many will come in my name, claiming, ‘I am the Messiah.’ They will deceive many.

Mat 24:6 NLT - And you will hear of wars and threats of wars, but don’t panic. Yes, these things must take place, but the end won’t follow immediately.

The Beginning of Birth Pains

  • War - Nation vs Nation; Kingdom vs Kingdom
  • Global Famines
  • Global Earthquakes

Mat 24:7 NLT - Nation will go to war against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be famines and earthquakes in many parts of the world.

Mat 24:8 NLT - But all this is only the first of the birth pains, with more to come.

Luke 21:11 adds …

  • Global Plagues
  • Terrifying Things
  • Great Miraculous Signs From Heaven

Luk 21:11 NLT - There will be great earthquakes, and there will be famines and plagues in many lands, and there will be terrifying things and great miraculous signs from heaven.

The More To Come

  • Arrest, Persecution, Killing of Christian Martyrs
  • Global Hatred for Christians
  • Global Turning Away From God
  • Rampant Betrayal and Hatred
  • False Prophets
  • Many Deceived
  • Global Rampant Sin
  • Love Of Many Grows Cold
  • Gospel Preached To The Whole World

Mat 24:9 NLT - “Then you will be arrested, persecuted, and killed. You will be hated all over the world because you are my followers.

Mat 24:10 NLT - And many will turn away from me and betray and hate each other.

Mat 24:11 NLT - And many false prophets will appear and will deceive many people.

Mat 24:12 NLT - Sin will be rampant everywhere, and the love of many will grow cold.

Mat 24:13 NLT - But the one who endures to the end will be saved.

Mat 24:14 NLT - And the Good News about the Kingdom will be preached throughout the whole world, so that all nations will hear it; and then the end will come.

Luke 21:12-19 expands on these signs.

  • A Time Of Great Persecution
  • Dragged Into Synagogues [Courts] And Prisons
  • Stand Trial Before Kings and Governors
  • Divine Wisdom Granted
  • Family And Friends Will Betray
  • Martyrdom
  • Worldwide Hatred Of Christians

Luk 21:12 NLT - “But before all this occurs, there will be a time of great persecution. You will be dragged into synagogues and prisons, and you will stand trial before kings and governors because you are my followers.

Luk 21:13 NLT - But this will be your opportunity to tell them about me.

Luk 21:14 NLT - So don’t worry in advance about how to answer the charges against you,

Luk 21:15 NLT - for I will give you the right words and such wisdom that none of your opponents will be able to reply or refute you!

Luk 21:16 NLT - Even those closest to you–your parents, brothers, relatives, and friends–will betray you. They will even kill some of you.

Luk 21:17 NLT - And everyone will hate you because you are my followers.

Luk 21:18 NLT - But not a hair of your head will perish!

Luk 21:19 NLT - By standing firm, you will win your souls.

Part 2 - Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - “What Sign Will Signal Your Return?”

Part 3 - Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - “When Will All This Happen?”

Reuse

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/

item.title: Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - What Sign Will Signal Your Return
item.dc:creator: Admin - Be Not Deceived
item.description:
What Is Jesus’ End-Time Timeline

What Sign Will Signal Your Return?

This is part 2 of Jesus’ End-Time Timeline as documented in Matthew 24. This article covers Jesus’ response to the disciples’ second question in Matthew 24:3 - “What Sign Will Signal Your Return?”

  • Abomination of Desolation In Temple
  • Worst Anquish Ever To Be Seen
  • Time of Calamity Shortened For The Sake Of The Elect
  • Miracle Working False Messiahs and False Prophets
  • Strong Deception
  • His Coming Is As Lightning

Mat 24:15 NLT - “The day is coming when you will see what Daniel the prophet spoke about–the sacrilegious object that causes desecration standing in the Holy Place.” (Reader, pay attention!)

Mat 24:16 NLT - “Then those in Judea must flee to the hills.

Mat 24:17 NLT - A person out on the deck of a roof must not go down into the house to pack.

Mat 24:18 NLT - A person out in the field must not return even to get a coat.

Mat 24:19 NLT - How terrible it will be for pregnant women and for nursing mothers in those days.

Mat 24:20 NLT - And pray that your flight will not be in winter or on the Sabbath.

Luke 21 adds the following perspective …

  • Jerusalem Surrounded By Armies
  • Days Of God’s Vengeance
  • Disaster In The Land [of Israel]
  • Great Anger Against Israel
  • People Killed or Taken Captive
  • Jerusalem Trampled Down By Gentiles - Time Of The Gentiles

Luk 21:20 NLT - “And when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then you will know that the time of its destruction has arrived.

Luk 21:21 NLT - Then those in Judea must flee to the hills. Those in Jerusalem must get out, and those out in the country should not return to the city.

Luk 21:22 NLT - For those will be days of God’s vengeance, and the prophetic words of the Scriptures will be fulfilled.

Luk 21:23 NLT - How terrible it will be for pregnant women and for nursing mothers in those days. For there will be disaster in the land and great anger against this people.

Luk 21:24 NLT - They will be killed by the sword or sent away as captives to all the nations of the world. And Jerusalem will be trampled down by the Gentiles until the period of the Gentiles comes to an end.

Back to Matthew 24 …

Mat 24:21 NLT - For there will be greater anguish than at any time since the world began. And it will never be so great again.

Mat 24:22 NLT - In fact, unless that time of calamity is shortened, not a single person will survive. But it will be shortened for the sake of God’s chosen ones.

Mat 24:23 NLT - “Then if anyone tells you, ‘Look, here is the Messiah,’ or ‘There he is,’ don’t believe it.

Mat 24:24 NLT - For false messiahs and false prophets will rise up and perform great signs and wonders so as to deceive, if possible, even God’s chosen ones.

Mat 24:25 NLT - See, I have warned you about this ahead of time.

Mat 24:26 NLT - “So if someone tells you, ‘Look, the Messiah is out in the desert,’ don’t bother to go and look. Or, ‘Look, he is hiding here,’ don’t believe it!

Mat 24:27 NLT - For as the lightning flashes in the east and shines to the west, so it will be when the Son of Man comes.

Mat 24:28 NLT - Just as the gathering of vultures shows there is a carcass nearby, so these signs indicate that the end is near.

Immediately After

  • Sun Will Be Darkened
  • Moon Will Give No Light
  • Stars Fall From Sky
  • Powers In Heaven Shaken

Mat 24:29 NLT - “Immediately after the anguish of those days, the sun will be darkened, the moon will give no light, the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers in the heavens will be shaken.

Please compare Matthew 24:29 with Revelation 6:12-14.

Rev 6:12 NLT - I watched as the Lamb broke the sixth seal, and there was a great earthquake. The sun became as dark as black cloth, and the moon became as red as blood.

Rev 6:13 NLT - Then the stars of the sky fell to the earth like green figs falling from a tree shaken by a strong wind.

Rev 6:14 NLT - The sky was rolled up like a scroll, and all of the mountains and islands were moved from their places.

THEN The Sign Of The Son Of Man

  • Jesus’ Sign Appears In The Heavens
  • Global Deep Mourning On Earth
  • Jesus Comes On The Clouds of Heaven
  • Angels Sent Out At Trumpet Blast
  • Chosen Ones Gathered From Heaven and Earth

Mat 24:30 NLT - And then at last, the sign that the Son of Man is coming will appear in the heavens, and there will be deep mourning among all the peoples of the earth. And they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.

Mat 24:31 NLT - And he will send out his angels with the mighty blast of a trumpet, and they will gather his chosen ones from all over the world–from the farthest ends of the earth and heaven.

Luke 21:28 adds …

Luk 21:28 NLT - So when all these things begin to happen, stand and look up, for your salvation is near!”

Part 1 - Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - “What Sign Will Signal The End Of The World?”

Part 3 - Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - “When Will All This Happen?”

Reuse

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/

item.title: Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - When Will All This Happen ?
item.dc:creator: Admin - Be Not Deceived
item.description:
What Is Jesus’ End-Time Timeline

When Will All This Happen

This is part 3 of Jesus’ End-Time Timeline as documented in Matthew 24. This article covers Jesus’ response to the disciples’ first question in Matthew 24:3 - “When Will All This Happen?”

When You See All These Things

  • The Generation That Sees These Signs Begin, Will See ALL These Things Take Place

Mat 24:32 NLT - “Now learn a lesson from the fig tree. When its branches bud and its leaves begin to sprout, you know that summer is near.

Mat 24:33 NLT - In the same way, when you see all these things, you can know his return is very near, right at the door.

Mat 24:34 NLT - I tell you the truth, this generation will not pass from the scene until all these things take place.

Mat 24:35 NLT - Heaven and earth will disappear, but my words will never disappear.

No One Knows the Day or Hour

  • No Man Knows
  • No Angel Knows
  • Even Jesus Does Not Know
  • ONLY The Father Knows

Mat 24:36 NLT - “However, no one knows the day or hour when these things will happen, not even the angels in heaven or the Son himself. Only the Father knows.

Like The Days Of Noah

  • Banquets, Parties, Weddings
  • Two Men Working - One Taken, The Other Left
  • Two Women Grinding - One Taken, The Other Left

Mat 24:37 NLT - “When the Son of Man returns, it will be like it was in Noah’s day.

Mat 24:38 NLT - In those days before the flood, the people were enjoying banquets and parties and weddings right up to the time Noah entered his boat.

Mat 24:39 NLT - People didn’t realize what was going to happen until the flood came and swept them all away. That is the way it will be when the Son of Man comes.

Mat 24:40 NLT - “Two men will be working together in the field; one will be taken, the other left.

Mat 24:41 NLT - Two women will be grinding flour at the mill; one will be taken, the other left.

Multiple Warnings

  • Keep Watch
  • Understand This
  • Be Ready All The Time

Mat 24:42 NLT - “So you, too, must keep watch! For you don’t know what day your Lord is coming.

Luke 21:34-36 adds …

  • Watch Out
  • Don’t Let Day Catch You Unaware
  • That Day Comes Upon The Whole Earth
  • Keep Alert
  • Pray To Be Strong Enough To Escape And To Stand Before The Son of Man

Luk 21:34 NLT - “Watch out! Don’t let your hearts be dulled by carousing and drunkenness, and by the worries of this life. Don’t let that day catch you unaware,

Luk 21:35 NLT - like a trap. For that day will come upon everyone living on the earth.

Luk 21:36 NLT - Keep alert at all times. And pray that you might be strong enough to escape these coming horrors and stand before the Son of Man.”

Mat 24:43 NLT - Understand this: If a homeowner knew exactly when a burglar was coming, he would keep watch and not permit his house to be broken into.

Mat 24:44 NLT - You also must be ready all the time, for the Son of Man will come when least expected.

Mat 24:45 NLT - “A faithful, sensible servant is one to whom the master can give the responsibility of managing his other household servants and feeding them.

Mat 24:46 NLT - If the master returns and finds that the servant has done a good job, there will be a reward.

Mat 24:47 NLT - I tell you the truth, the master will put that servant in charge of all he owns.

Mat 24:48 NLT - But what if the servant is evil and thinks, ‘My master won’t be back for a while,’

Mat 24:49 NLT - and he begins beating the other servants, partying, and getting drunk?

Mat 24:50 NLT - The master will return unannounced and unexpected,

Mat 24:51 NLT - and he will cut the servant to pieces and assign him a place with the hypocrites. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

This concludes the 3 part series of Jesus’ End-Time Timeline.

Part 1 - Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - “What Sign Will Signal The End Of The World?” Part 2 - Jesus’ End-Time Timeline - “What Sign Will Signal Your Return?”

Reuse

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/

item.title: Welcome to Be Not Deceived
item.dc:creator: Admin - Be Not Deceived
item.description:
Welcome to Be Not Deceived!

Welcome!!! I am very glad you’re here

I invite you to read Why ‘Be Not Deceived’.  This page outlines the purpose of Be Not Deceived and the Biblical text which is the basis for which I started the blog.

I do hope you will stop by once I have created more content.

Thank you for stopping by Be Not Deceived!

Reuse

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/
